channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ebonyi Death Row Inmate Claims Wrongful Conviction Amid Conflicting Accounts of Student’s Death
item.description: For Ebonyi State, one man wey dey condemned to death by hanging, Elechi Ikechukwu, don come out dey claim say dem condemn am wrongly for the matter wey concern one student from Ebonyi State University...

item.title: Cape Breton Homes Suffered Significant Losses After Post-Tropical Storm Fiona, Survey Finds
item.description: A recent survey highlights the economic impact of post-tropical storm Fiona on Cape Breton's homes. On average, homes in the area experienced a financial loss of $4,000 as a result of the storm, which...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Weighs on Wall Street, Sparking Market Uncertainty
item.description: US equity and bond markets experienced further losses this week, concluding a tumultuous trading period as heightened tensions in the Middle East demonstrate no immediate resolution. Reports from CBS ...

item.title: European Leaders Grapple with Energy Crisis and Ukraine Loan Dispute Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: At a Brussels summit on Thursday, European leaders confronted a host of international crises that have disrupted their plans for economic reform and regional stability. Originally intended to focus on...

item.title: 19-year-old Mexican dies by apparent suicide in Florida ICE detention center
item.description: A 19-year-old Mexican national, Royer Perez-Jimenez, has died in the custody of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) at the Glades County Detention Center in southern Florida. ICE reported t...

item.title: An Inside Look at the Jackie Cameron School of Food and Wine’s Student Final Dinner
item.description: Chef Jackie Cameron invited guests to a special dinner at her School of Food and Wine, showcasing the talent of third-year students. Each student had to design a menu representing three different cuis...

item.title: Philippine Navy Reports Chinese Vessel Aimed Fire Control Radar at BRP Miguel Malvar near Sabina Shoal
item.description: The Philippine Navy reported that a Chinese People’s Liberation Army (PLA) Navy ship targeted its fire control radar at the missile frigate BRP Miguel Malvar while it was conducting a routine sovereig...

item.title: Experts stress the need for human-centred skills in the AI-driven future
item.description: The article, written by journalist Ramadhani Ismail from Mwananchi Communications Limited in Dar es Salaam, explores how artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming the way people learn, work and int...

item.title: Chuck Norris: The Martial Arts Icon Who Defined 1980s Action Cinema
item.description: The Guardian’s Peter Bradshaw reflects on the life and cinematic legacy of Chuck Norris, the American martial artist and actor who rose to stardom in the 1970s and dominated 1980s action cinema. Known...

item.title: San Diego County Water Authority Signs $100 Million Deal to Sell Water to Riverside County
item.description: The San Diego County Water Authority (SDCWA) has entered into a long-term agreement to sell water to the Western Municipal Water District in Riverside County. The deal, expected to generate about $100...

item.title: Tanzania and Zanzibar Collaborate to Create More Job Opportunities for Youth and Women
item.description: The governments of Tanzania and Zanzibar have launched a new collaboration aimed at expanding job opportunities both within the country and internationally. This move targets improving the working con...

item.title: Keeping your eyes open can improve hearing in noisy environments
item.description: A recent study from Shanghai Jiao Tong University challenges the common belief that closing your eyes helps you hear better. Researchers tested participants' ability to detect faint sounds under diffe...

item.title: Delhi HC rules that LOC against Prannoy and Radhika Roy violates personal liberty
item.description: The Delhi High Court has quashed a look-out circular (LOC) issued in January 2021 against NDTV founders Prannoy Roy and Radhika Roy. The LOC was initiated following cases registered by the Central Bur...

item.title: Queensland meat plant faces enforcement order over ongoing odour complaints in Landsborough
item.description: Residents of Landsborough on Queensland’s Sunshine Coast have raised strong concerns about a persistent and unpleasant smell coming from a nearby meat rendering plant, operated by Norganic Proteins. D...

item.title: Former TOWIE star Jordan Wright found dead in Thailand after disturbing final footage emerges
item.description: Former TOWIE and Ex On The Beach personality Jordan Wright, aged 33, was discovered dead in a drainage canal in Phuket, Thailand, on 14 March 2026. CCTV footage released by Thai authorities recorded h...

item.title: Bangladeshi Man Arrested for Spreading Fake Bomb Threats to Gurugram Schools
item.description: A Bangladeshi man, identified as Saurabh Vishwas alias Michael, was arrested by Gurugram Police for sending fake bomb threats to several schools in the area. The accused, who had entered India illegal...

item.title: South African car industry calls for stronger localisation to protect jobs and boost manufacturing
item.description: South Africa’s automotive component manufacturers are calling for tighter localisation policies to protect the domestic industry from the dual pressures of US tariffs and cheap car imports. Speaking a...

item.title: NASA Sets Early April Window for Artemis II Moon Mission as Crew Quarantines
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission, the first planned crewed lunar voyage in over 50 years, is returning to the launchpad after a series of technical delays. Following a setback in February caused by a liquid ...

item.title: Federal Report Warns of Possible Lone-Actor Threat to Canadian Jewish Community
item.description: The federal Integrated Threat Assessment Centre (ITAC) has issued a report warning that a violent extremist attack against Canada’s Jewish community is a realistic possibility over the next six months...

item.title: FG and UK University to Set Up Campus in Lagos for Affordable World-Class Education
item.description: Nigeria don take big step to give students better access to international standard education while also cutting down capital wey dey go abroad for school fees. The Federal Government don partner with ...
